LanguageData.Outerm_Faction.label: Haos
LanguageData.Outerm_Faction.description:
A criminal syndicate of the underworld made up of Outerms.
It is known as an exceptionally brutal faction, and some say its savagery surpasses even the Orcinus Brigade.
They revel in slaughter and plunder, and do not stop their atrocities until either they or their prey are dead.

All for sweet, melting ecstasy, and in accordance with the will of their great god.
